pr.title: Record: Int6 + MLP 3x + NorMuon + SmearGate + BigramHash + OrthoInit + Sliding Window, val_bpb=1.1541

output.summary: Int6 quantization funds a 3x MLP with orthogonal muP init, NorMuon, SmearGate, and BigramHash token-pair context, evaluated via stride-256 sliding windows.
